articles.title: PM Modi Chairs Key Economic Advisory Council Meeting Amid Iran War
articles.description: The prime minister and the EAC-PM members discussed various ideas and measures to further boost India's economic growth in times of global turmoil

articles.title: Kerala sets up expert panel to study DMRC high-speed rail proposal
articles.description: Kerala forms an expert committee to evaluate DMRC's high-speed rail proposal, focusing on technical, financial, and environmental aspects.

articles.title: When will EPFO interest for FY 2026-26 be credited? Will there be loss of money in case of delay? Explained
articles.description: Subscribers can continue to earn the same rate of return on their EPF balances at 8.25 percent this fiscal year too.

articles.title: AI Could Soon Use More Water Than Humanity Drinks, UN Warns
articles.description: A new United Nations University report warns that AI-powered data centres could consume enough water to meet the annual domestic needs of 1.3 billion people by 2030, highlighting the hidden...

articles.title: Rs 1,100 for parathas, Rs 500 for 3 eggs: Man calls out 'absurd' food prices at luxury hotel, sparks debate
articles.description: When his dinner bill at a five-star hotel in Mumbai came to Rs 2,300, one guest simply could not believe it. His order of aloo parathas, boiled eggs, curd and a milkshake has since sparked a debate about luxury pricing.

articles.title: Innovision bags Rs 25.70 crore NHAI contract
articles.description: Innovision has received a letter of award (LoA) from the National Highways Authority of India (NHAI) worth Rs 25.70 crore for toll collection at the Belon Fee Plaza on the Aligarh-Moradabad section of NH-93 (NH-509) in Uttar Pradesh.

articles.title: After Andaman breakthrough, India launches mega East Coast energy hunt
articles.description: The government has invited global bids for fresh surveys across four key east coast basins as it looks to unlock untapped oil and natural gas reserves.

articles.title: PM Modi chairs meeting with EAC-PM members, discusses measures to boost economic growth
articles.description: The meeting, held in the national capital, focused on measures to further accelerate economic growth at a time when several major economies are grappling with geopolitical tensions, supply chain disruptions and slowing global demand.

articles.title: Luxury cruise liner visits Thoothukudi Port
PM Modi chairs EAC meeting, discusses measures to boost India’s economic growth amid global turmoil
articles.description: Prime Minister Narendra Modi met with the Economic Advisory Council to discuss strengthening India's economic growth amidst global uncertainty. The Reserve Bank of India kept the repo rate unchanged at 5.25%, citing geopolitical tensions and inflation concerns, while revising GDP growth and inflation projections downwards and upwards respectively for FY2026-27.

articles.title: FPIs get tax relief on gilts, ease of Investment
articles.description: In a strategic step to lure foreign investment, India has eliminated taxes on capital gains and interest for overseas investors in its government bonds. This change, set to take effect on April 1, is part of an ordinance aimed at enhancing the appeal of Indian sovereign bonds and fortifying the strength of the rupee.

articles.title: 'I stopped asking...' Google engineer shares how he went from Rs 5 LPA job to Rs 1.5 crore package in 5 years
articles.description: An anonymous Reddit user shared how he grew from earning Rs 5 lakh per annum at a startup in 2020 to securing a Rs 1.5 crore compensation package at Google within five years.

articles.title: E85 fuel to get Rs 20/litre cheaper as India ramps up ethanol push
articles.description: India is launching E85 petrol, an 85% ethanol blend, at discounted prices. This move aims to boost clean fuel adoption and cut reliance on imported fossil fuels. The government plans a phased rollout of E85 dispensing stations nationwide. Vehicle manufacturers are introducing E85 compatible models. This initiative is expected to benefit farmers and save foreign exchange.

articles.title: India-US Trade Pact Set For First Breakthrough As Initial Agreement Nears Mid-July Finish Line
articles.description: India and the United States are nearing a key milestone in trade negotiations, with Commerce Minister Piyush Goyal indicating that the first phase of a bilateral trade agreement could be signed by mid-July. The proposed pact aims to boost market access for Indian exporters and deepen economic cooperation, even as concerns remain over new US tariff proposals affecting Indian goods.

articles.title: Woman who took Rs 50 lakh loan for master's abroad says biggest return wasn't money
articles.description: A woman who took a Rs 50 lakh loan for her master's abroad shared her experience, highlighting the brutal London job market and her successful repayment in Dubai. She emphasized that the personal growth and life lessons gained were invaluable, outweighing the financial aspects and encouraging informed decisions beyond just numbers.

articles.title: '3 Eggs For Rs 500': Man Complains About 'Absurd' Hotel Food Prices
articles.description: A Mumbai hotel guest shared their shock online after receiving a Rs 2,300 bill where they were charged Rs 500 plus taxes for three eggs.

articles.title: Adani Ports incorporates UAE-based step-down subsidiary for marine operations
articles.description: Adani Ports and Special Economic Zone (APSEZ) has incorporated a new step-down wholly owned subsidiary in the United Arab Emirates as part of its marine business expansion strategy.

articles.title: TG POLYCET Phase 1 Seat Allotment Result 2026 releasing today; check direct link here
articles.description: TG POLYCET Phase 1 Seat Allotment Result 2026 is expected today. Candidates can check their allotment status online and complete fee payment, self-reporting and admission formalities within scheduled deadlines.

articles.title: Jammu Kashmir: Joint anti-terror operation by Indian Army,Police and CRPF enters fourteenth day in Rajouri
articles.description: Security forces continue a major anti-terror operation in Rajouri's dense forests. The operation, now in its fourteenth day, involves the Indian Army, Jammu and Kashmir Police, and CRPF. Intensive search and combing operations are underway to track suspected terrorists. Security forces are maintaining a strong cordon and monitoring the area closely.

articles.title: Meta Considers Raising Billions In Share Sale: Report
articles.description: Meta hasn't yet hired banks and may not ultimately issue new stock, the FT reported, citing three people familiar with the discussions.

articles.title: Nasdaq 100 sinks 5% in AI-led rout as yields climb
articles.description: Growing anxiety about valuations sent the S&P 500 down 2.6%, with the index failing to complete a 10th straight week of gains. The Nasdaq 100 sank about 5%, the most since April 2025.

articles.title: NMDC Plans India's First Branded Iron Ore Product, Targets Premium Pricing
articles.description: State-run miner NDTV approves Rs 3,000 crore Vizag blending facility as it looks to move beyond volume growth.

articles.title: Auto manufacturer to set up new biogas plant in Sonepat
articles.description: The automobile company claimed that it will invest around ₹150 crore in the two projects as part of its broader strategy to strengthen renewable energy use and reduce dependence on fossil fuels

articles.title: Trump urges new acting spy chief Bill Pulte to fire intelligence employees
articles.description: Trump had earlier said in an interview with the Wall Street Journal that he wanted Pulte -- who will oversee the 18 sprawling US intelligence agencies -- to slash employee numbers.

articles.title: India-US trade pact first phase likely by mid-July
articles.description: India and US set to finalize first phase of bilateral trade deal by mid-July after positive talks, aiming for preferential access and cooperation.

articles.title: PSU Banks Added More Branches. But Employee Growth Didn't Keep Up
articles.description: Major state-run lenders reported lower employee-to-branch ratios between FY22 and FY26 while outlining plans to automate processes, expand digital banking and deploy AI tools.

articles.title: India defies West Asia war concerns as Q4 GDP growth hits 7.8%; risks remain ahead
articles.description: India's economy surged by a better-than-expected 7.8% in the March quarter, exceeding forecasts and pushing FY26 growth to 7.7%. This robust performance was driven by strong private investment and consumption, defying concerns over the West Asia war. The government remains committed to its reform agenda to maintain economic momentum.

articles.title: Leo Horoscope Today, June 6, 2026: A practical decision may unlock a rewarding new chapter
articles.description: Leo Horoscope Today: A promising development in money, work, or relationships may bring greater stability and steady progress today.

articles.title: Reform, perform, transform will go on: PM Modi hails 7.7% GDP growth
articles.description: Addressing a public meeting in Daman near Gujarat, the PM said India would continue to move on the path of “reform, perform and transform” at a fast pace. Modi said, “Today, a good news has come... The figures that have come today make it clear how strong the foundation of India’s economy is.”

articles.title: India’s FY26 growth hits 7.7%
articles.description: Indian economy grew at 7.7% in FY 2025-26, with GDP reaching 7.8% in Q4. Despite challenges, reforms and hard work are driving growth momentum.

articles.title: Chip slump erases $1.3 trillion in stock market value
articles.description: The PHLX's combined loss of 12% over two sessions shows investors are becoming more concerned about pricey, high-flying tech stocks just as Elon Musk prepares a blockbuster initial public ⁠offering next week for SpaceX at an exceedingly high $1.75 trillion valuation.

articles.title: GDP rose 7.7% in FY26, 7.8% in Q4; RBI trims this year's projection to 6.6%
articles.description: India's economy surged by 7.8% in the Jan-March quarter, driven by strong investment, consistent farm output, and expansion in construction and tertiary sectors. This robust demand offset potential negative impacts from West Asian conflicts. The government remains committed to driving economic momentum through decisive policy measures.

articles.title: From tax waivers to free hedges, RBI & govt join hands to boost Rupee
articles.description: Government and RBI have launched new measures to attract foreign investment in bonds and bank deposits. These initiatives aim to boost inflows by easing regulations and offering currency protection. The rupee strengthened significantly following the announcements, with potential for substantial retail deposit growth. Tax exemptions for foreign investors on government securities are also in place.

articles.title: Marvell to join S&P 500 after AI boom helps chipmaker pass profitability test
articles.description: June 5 : Marvell Technology is set to join the benchmark S&P 500 index, S&P Dow Jones Indices said on Friday, sending the chipmaker's shares up 6 per cent in extended trading.The company will join the benchmark index later this month, after it recently cleared a key profitability hurdle riding a blistering AI

articles.title: $2 Trillion Wiped Out In Hours: What Triggered Bloodbath In US Tech Stocks?
articles.description: On Wall Street, all three major indexes ended lower, led by heavy selling in technology shares. Dow Jones fell 1%, the S&P 500 lost 2.4%, while the Nasdaq Composite plunged 4%.

articles.title: ITG reveals revenue rise in US IPO filing as listings market heat up
articles.description: June 5 : Digital infrastructure services startup ITG reported a rise in quarterly and annual revenue in its filing to go public in the U.S. on Friday, as a host of companies line up to tap the public markets. A rebound in activity in the U.S. initial public offering market has made boardrooms eager to list th

articles.title: Could this new spirulina finally give vegans the vitamin B12 they have been waiting for? Scientists say this breakthrough may change plant-based nutrition forever
articles.description: For years, vitamin B12 has remained one of the biggest challenges in vegan nutrition. Now, a breakthrough in active B12 spirulina could change that. Scientists produced bioavailable vitamin B12 levels comparable to beef while maintaining spirulinas high-protein profile. If scaled successfully, this sustainable superfood may reshape plant-based diets, food security, and future protein production worldwide.

articles.title: Give Your Network an Early Prime Day Refresh: This Amazon Router Just Dropped to Its Lowest Price Ever
articles.description: Prime Day is coming up fast, but we're already finding early deals popping up. So, you don't have to wait for the annual summer sale to arrive to snag better Wi-Fi with this Eero Pro 6E bargain.

articles.title: For a few dollars more: Inflation bypass can hurt
articles.description: India's central bank holds interest rates steady despite rising inflation. The focus shifts to stabilizing the rupee with a new dollar deposit scheme. This move aims to attract foreign currency and boost confidence. While offering gains to non-resident Indians, it comes at a significant cost and distorts market rates.

articles.title: CM Vijay directs urban localbodies to intensify morning checks, revenue collection
articles.description: Tamil Nadu's CM directs urban local bodies to enhance morning inspections, streamline services, and boost revenue collection through a 16-point circular.

articles.description: Villages spared as rural registrations see modest hike in Telangana

articles.title: Address garbage disposal on priority: Karnataka Lokayukta
articles.description: Karnataka Lokayukta BS Patil visits Bengaluru areas after complaints of unscientific garbage dumping; forms 5 teams, identifies 6 black spots, seeks quick action.

articles.title: Payment delays trigger supply shortages in govt hospitals across Telangana
articles.description: Telangana govt hospitals face supply shortages as TGMSIDC dues top Rs 128 crore, forcing patients to buy surgical and diagnostic consumables privately.

articles.title: SBI Mutual Fund buys stakes in 2 Adani group firms for ₹5,747 cr
articles.description: SBI Mutual Fund on Friday bought stakes in Adani Enterprises and Adani Energy Solutions from US-based GQG Partners for Rs 5,747 crore through open market transactions. SBI Mutual Fund purchased 1,64,39,984 shares representing nearly a 1.3 per cent stake in Adani Enterprises, the flagship entity of the Adani Group, according to block deal data on the National Stock Exchange (NSE). In addition, SBI MF also acquired 63,65,796 shares, amounting to a 0.52 per cent stake in Adani Energy Solutions. The shares were picked up in the price range of Rs 1,504.80-2,913.40 apiece, taking the combined transaction value to Rs 5,747.55 crore. Meanwhile, Rajiv Jain-backed GQG Partners, through its affiliate GQG Partners Emerging Markets Equity Fund, offloaded the same number of shares in the two Adani group companies. The stake buy comes after SBI Mutual Fund last month acquired a 0.45 per cent stake in Adani's flagship firm Adani Enterprises, for Rs 1,435 crore. Shares of Adani Enterprises rose 2

articles.title: On World Environment Day, Samrat launches ‘one-lakh sapling plantation’ drive
articles.description: Samrat Choudhary launches Bihar one-lakh tree drive; targets rooftop solar for 50 lakh homes in 2 years, with subsidies, buyback for excess power.

articles.title: Plantation for illegal felling of 1,100 trees in ridge gets Namo Oxygen Park tag
articles.description: Supreme Court-ordered compensatory plantation for DDA’s illegal felling of 1,100+ Delhi Ridge trees inaugurated as 18 ‘Namo Oxygen Parks’ on 185 acres.

articles.description: Many Key Matches Kick Off Between 12.30 am And 5.30 am IST
